prose:
**Ethylene HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals), PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point calculation on the provided ethylene input file (6 atoms: C, C, H, H, H, H). SCF converged in 6 cycles. HOMO energy = −7.6156 eV (orbital index 7), LUMO energy = −0.1799 eV (orbital index 8). **HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357 eV**. Secondary descriptors from Koopmans theorem: vertical IP = 7.6156 eV, vertical EA = 0.1799 eV, electronegativity = 3.8977 eV, chemical hardness = 3.7179 eV, electrophilicity index = 2.0431 eV. Total electronic energy = −2139.454 eV (−78.623 Hartree). Command: `chemkit frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`. Integrity: trustworthy=true.</prose>
